TlT.^.ft. 577 (3T) 3 VTTcf ^R^R gft 3?fej^Tl 3 faRfaf&cT wit^R ^n^ft I , 3T«^:— ^ r 3ifej^n 3 w ^ r "*m<jft, tn^fo lo ^ w ^ , - fcf" [TR U "Q^B-11014/13/201 l-^X4>+4JHl (2) ] ST^T ^ . TT^ST, ¥g=RT wfaq TTR f^tnift :3I*JFT aRfepg^n <tf f ^ F 11-12-2009 ^ tf. m^T.fr. 884( 3?) ^ n?cT «trar ^ ir^m 2053 GI/2012 MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health and Family Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th June, 2012 GS.R. 433(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of the serodiagnostic test kits of diagnosis of tuberculosis are giving inconsistent and imprecise results.leading to wrong diagnosis and their use is likely to involve risk to human beings and whereas safer alternatives are available; And whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the Import of the said test kits in public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 10A of the Drugs and Cosmetic Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare number G S. R. 577 (E), dated the 23rd Ju ly, 1983, namely :— In the Table appended to the said notification, after serialnumber 10 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be inserted, namely:— "II. Serodiagnostic test kits for diagnosis of tuberculosis." [F.No. X-110I4/13/2011-DFQC(2)] ARUN K. PANDA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide No. G. S. R. 884(E), dated 11-12-2009. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-] 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
